message:
fix(core): replace truncating epoch_ms casts with try_from across modules

Replace `d.as_millis() as i64` truncating casts with safe
`i64::try_from(d.as_millis()).ok().unwrap_or(0)` in now_ms() helpers
across suggestions.rs, accounts.rs, alerts.rs, and environment.rs.
Matches the pattern already used in ingest.rs and approval.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
